    Platform

    How It Works

    Wallet-connected onboarding: from profile to certification in 5 simple steps.
    01

    Connect Wallet

    Connect your wallet securely. Read-only — no signing required.
    02

    Get Your DeFi Profile

    We analyze your on-chain activity to build your personalized profile.
    03

    Access Curriculum

    Receive a custom learning path: tokenomics, risk, governance, and strategy.
    04

    Track Progress

    Real-time dashboards, leaderboards, and team analytics.
    05

    Earn Certification

    Earn on-chain credentials that prove your expertise.
    about us

    The Institutional DeFi Intelligence Platform

    Elite Expertise. On-Chain Credentials. Real Results.
    Tokenomic brings together the world's leading DeFi educators and consultants on one wallet-gated platform. Access expert-led courses, 1-on-1 advisory sessions, and institutional-grade research — purpose-built for organizations and professionals entering decentralized finance.
    The Platform

    Your Institutional DeFi Command Center

    Wallet-connected dashboard with courses, revenue tracking, team chat, workshops, leaderboards, and USDC payments on Base.

    Structured Courses

    8 comprehensive courses covering DeFi fundamentals through advanced institutional strategies. Modules, quizzes, and progress tracking included.

    Revenue & Analytics

    Track USDC revenue, view payment splits, export transaction history, and monitor financial performance with real-time charts.

    Community & Chat

    Create and manage learning communities with real-time messaging, event coordination, and member engagement tools.

    Events & Workshops

    Schedule and manage live workshops, AMAs, and training sessions with integrated calendar and booking system.

    Leaderboard & XP

    Gamified learning with experience points, streaks, badges, and team leaderboards to drive engagement and completion.

    USDC Payments on Base

    Native crypto payments with automatic revenue splitting (90/5/5) via smart contracts on Base L2 for low-cost transactions.

    Connect Wallet to Access Dashboard
    Built For Institutions

    Who Is Tokenomic For?

    Whether you manage a fund, run a bank's digital assets desk, or lead a DAO — Tokenomic gives your team the structured DeFi education and intelligence they need.

    Investment Funds

    Train portfolio managers and analysts on DeFi protocols, yield strategies, and risk assessment frameworks.

    Banks & Financial Institutions

    Equip compliance, treasury, and innovation teams with regulatory-aware DeFi knowledge and operational frameworks.

    DAOs & Protocol Teams

    Upskill contributors on governance design, tokenomics modeling, treasury management, and security best practices.

    Corporate Innovation Teams

    Accelerate your organization's Web3 strategy with hands-on training from blockchain basics to advanced implementation.

    Security First

    Why Connect a Wallet?

    Your wallet is your identity in DeFi. Connecting it allows Tokenomic to personalize your learning experience based on your actual on-chain activity — no passwords, no email signups, no custodial risk.

    Connect Wallet
    Read-Only Access

    We never request transaction signing permissions. Your wallet data is read-only — we analyze public on-chain data to build your DeFi profile.

    Non-Custodial

    We never hold, store, or have access to your private keys or funds. You maintain full custody of your assets at all times.

    Compatible Wallets

    Works with MetaMask, Rabby, Coinbase Wallet, and any EVM-compatible browser wallet. Institutional custody solutions (Fireblocks, Ledger) are also supported.

    Why Tokenomic

    We Don't Just Teach DeFi.
    We Onboard Institutions Into It.

    Traditional DeFi education stops at theory. Tokenomic goes further — combining structured curricula with wallet-native tools, real-time analytics, and on-chain credentials to create a complete institutional onboarding layer.

    Training

    Unlock the Power of DeFi

    Learn from the leaders in DeFi with our structured courses and practical workshops.

    Courses

    Enhance your career with our comprehensive DeFi courses, covering everything from blockchain basics to advanced governance, equipping you with in-demand skills for the tech and finance industries.

    Workshops

    Gain hands-on experience and valuable insights through our live DeFi workshops and webinars, where you can apply knowledge in real-world scenarios and network with industry experts and peers.
    Services

    Complete Blockchain Services for Your Success

    Explore the power of blockchain with our all-in-one service suite. Whether it's through expert training, fundraising support, technical help, market insights, or legal guidance, we provide everything you need to succeed in today's digital world.
